title: Global Markets Brief — 15 Jul 2026
intro: Risk-on sentiment prevails across Asian markets as tech equities rally and growth-sensitive currencies outperform amid easing concerns over global inflation trajectories.

sections.heading: 🌍 MACRO TONE
sections.content: Risk-on sentiment prevails across Asian markets as tech equities rally and growth-sensitive currencies outperform amid easing concerns over global inflation trajectories.

sections.heading: 📊 FX RANKING
sections.content:
EUR +0.16% — Eurozone recovery optimism supports single currency gains
AUD +0.19% — Commodity strength and risk appetite lift Aussie
GBP +0.13% — Sterling benefits from broad dollar weakness
NZD +0.02% — Kiwi consolidates recent gains in thin trading
JPY -0.02% — Yen weakens further as USD/JPY approaches intervention zone at 162
CHF -0.01% — Safe haven flows diminish on risk-on tone
CAD -0.09% — Loonie underperforms despite oil rally on domestic concerns
USD — Greenback soft across the board on Fed rate cut expectations

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EUR/USD 1.1443 | Bias: LONG | Watch: 1.1400 support holding firm, target 1.1500 on dollar weakness
USD/JPY 162.2140 | Bias: NEUTRAL | Watch: 162.50 for potential MOF intervention signals
AUD/USD 0.6987 | Bias: LONG | Watch: 0.7000 psychological level as commodity demand improves

sections.heading: 📈 INDICES
sections.content:
Nikkei 225: 68543 +1.18% — Tech sector strength drives Japanese equities to new highs
Nasdaq: 26107 +0.90% — AI and semiconductor stocks lead overnight gains
S&P 500: 5751.83 +0.36% — Broad-based advance continues multi-day winning streak
DAX: 25147 +0.13% — European futures point to cautious open despite positive Asian lead

sections.heading: 🛢️ COMMODITIES
sections.content:
Gold: $4040.20 -0.72% — Profit-taking after recent highs as real yields tick higher
WTI Crude: $79.87 +0.67% — Supply concerns support prices amid Middle East tensions
Silver: $58.77 -0.56% — Industrial metal follows gold lower on risk rotation

sections.heading: ₿ CRYPTO
sections.content:
Bitcoin: $64756 -0.34% — Consolidation continues below $65000 resistance as institutional flows pause
Ethereum: $1876.27 -0.72% — ETH underperforms on network upgrade uncertainty and regulatory overhang

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: EUR/USD | 1.1420-1.1440 | Dollar weakness and ECB hawkish repricing support upside
LONG: WTI Crude | $79.50-80.00 | Geopolitical premium and summer demand seasonality
SHORT: Gold | $4045-4055 | Overbought conditions and rising real yields warrant correction
SHORT: USD/JPY | 162.50-163.00 | Intervention risk escalates at these elevated levels
